tldr.title: A global workspace in language models
tldr.author: bshanks
bullets: Implementing Global Workspace Theory in LLMs introduces a centralized, low-dimensional latent bottleneck to coordinate modular representations.
The communication bottleneck forces models to compress information, improving out-of-distribution generalization and multi-step reasoning.
This architecture utilizes Perceiver-style attention bottlenecks or recurrent shared states to optimize working memory in Transformer models.
